title: Define removal/replacement of legacy artifact paths
summary: Specify how legacy snapshot/handoff/checkpoint artifacts are removed or replaced in the 0.4.0 redesign (no backward compatibility).
acceptance_criteria: Legacy artifact handling is explicitly defined for journal/checkpoint/snapshot/handoff.
Canonical artifacts are the only sources of truth in 0.4.0.
Path policy reuse under CWD/.agent/ is documented.
No backward compatibility promises are stated.

steps.description: Enumerate legacy artifacts and their current roles.
Map each legacy role to new canonical artifacts or mark as removed.
Document output path policy reuse under CWD/.agent/.
Specify that handoff is a derived-only view.

notes: Align with Phase 2 writer pipeline and resume specs.
Keep policy compatible with semantic memory requirements.
